title: Our Own Sins Unseen.
content:
Other men's sins we ever bear in mind;
    None sees the fardell of his faults behind.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Our Own Sins Unseen.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
